title: Calgary’s Green Line alignment update is on the tracks
text:
Live Streaming 24/7
Calgary’s Green Line alignment update is on the tracks
Rayn Rashid has more on a 'positive' meeting between Calgary Mayor Jyoti Gondek and the province on the future of the Green Line LRT.
20m ago

Clean up underway after an explosion in Calgary’s community of Mahogany
The clean-up began after an explosion destroyed a Calgary home in the SE community of Mahogany Thursday afternoon. Phoenix Phillips talks to witnesses who recalled hearing the explosion and are surprised only one townhome was destroyed.
26m ago
